meaning: adj.一心一意的,诚恳的,整整的,全神贯注的
examples: The plan was given wholehearted support.
The governor deserves our wholehearted support for having taken a step in this direction.
A further reason for its success is its wholehearted embrace of globalisation.
Even so, Google's purchase won less than wholehearted endorsement from American and European officials.
This wholehearted approach to sales, leadership and life has served me well over the long term.
